welcomeMessage.en: Today, we are diving into the world of entertainment!
welcomeMessage.zh: 今天，我们将深入探讨娱乐世界！

welcomeMessage.en: We will talk about our favorite movies, TV shows, and binge-watching habits.
welcomeMessage.zh: 我们将谈论我们最喜欢的电影、电视节目和刷剧习惯。

welcomeMessage.en: Grab your popcorn and get ready to share your cinematic masterpieces.
welcomeMessage.zh: 拿好你的爆米花，准备分享你心中的电影杰作。

questionsToThinkAbout.en: What is your all-time favorite movie or TV show, and why?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 你一直以来最喜欢的电影或电视节目是什么，为什么？

questionsToThinkAbout.en: Do you prefer watching movies at home or going to the movie theater?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 你更喜欢在家看电影还是去电影院看？

questionsToThinkAbout.en: Have you ever binge-watched a TV series? How many episodes did you watch in one day?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 你曾经连续刷过一部剧吗？你一天看了多少集？

questionsToThinkAbout.en: Which genre of movies do you like the most? (e.g., action, comedy, horror, sci-fi)
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 你最喜欢哪种类型的电影？（比如动作、喜剧、恐怖、科幻）

questionsToThinkAbout.en: If you could be any character from a movie, who would you be?
questionsToThinkAbout.zh: 如果你能成为电影里的任何一个角色，你想成为谁？

vocabulary.definition: A category of artistic composition, characterized by similarities in form, style, or subject matter.
vocabulary.example: My favorite movie genre is science fiction.

vocabulary.definition: To watch multiple episodes of a television program in rapid succession.
vocabulary.example: I binge-watched the entire new season of Stranger Things in one weekend.

vocabulary.definition: A work of outstanding artistry, skill, or workmanship.
vocabulary.example: Many critics consider The Godfather to be a cinematic masterpiece.

vocabulary.definition: Information about the plot of a motion picture or TV program that can ruin a viewer's sense of surprise or suspense.
vocabulary.example: Don't tell me what happens at the end! I hate spoilers.

vocabulary.definition: Each of the separate installments into which a serialized story or radio or television program is divided.
vocabulary.example: I usually watch one episode of Friends before I go to bed.

vocabulary.definition: The leading character or one of the major characters in a drama, movie, novel, or other fictional text.
vocabulary.example: The protagonist of the story has to overcome many challenges to save the world.
The cinematic effects in that movie were absolutely stunning.

vocabulary.definition: Captions displayed at the bottom of a movie or television screen that translate or transcribe the dialogue or narrative.
vocabulary.example: I prefer to watch foreign movies with English subtitles.
